content: Dear trainer: \n    Your performance in the ranked matches was amazing! As of 21:00, you achieved rank No. %d. Rewards have been sent to your mail, please check and claim it. \n    Happy gaming!
content_tw: 親愛的小夥伴:\n    您在競技場中的表現精彩絕倫，截止到今天21:00，您的名次是%d，結算獎勵已隨郵件發送，請及時查收。\n    祝您遊戲愉快!
content_en: Dear trainer: \n    Your performance in the ranked matches was amazing! As of 21:00, you achieved rank No. %d. Rewards have been sent to your mail, please check and claim it. \n    Happy gaming!
content_vn: Nhà huấn luyện thân mến: \n    Thành tích của bạn trong các trận đấu xếp hạng thật tuyệt vời! Tính đến 21:00, bạn đã đạt hạng %d. Phần thưởng đã được gửi vào thư của bạn, vui lòng kiểm tra và nhận. \n    Chúc bạn chơi game vui vẻ!
content_kr: 트레이너님: \n   아레나에서 멋진 활약을 펼치셨군요. 오늘 21:00까지 %d위를 달성하였으며, 결산 보상을 우편으로 지급합니다. 제때 수령해 주세요. \n   즐거운 게임 되시길 바랍니다!
content_pt: Caro(a) Treinador(a): \n    Seu desempenho nas partidas ranqueadas foi incrível! Às 21:00, você alcançou o ranque de Nº %d. As recompensas foram enviadas para o seu correio, por favor, verifique e resgate. \n    Bom jogo!
content_th: ถึงเทรนเนอร์: \n    ผลงานของคุณในแมตช์จัดอันดับนั้นยอดเยี่ยมมาก! ณ เวลา 21:00 คุณได้รับอันดับที่ %d รางวัลถูกส่งไปยังจดหมายของคุณแล้ว โปรดตรวจสอบและกดรับ \n    ขอให้สนุกกับการเล่นเกม!

subject: "You're the MVP" Compensation Pack
subject_vn: Gói Bồi thường "Bạn là MVP"
subject_pt: Pacote de Compensação "Você é o MVP"
subject_th: แพ็กเกจชดเชย "คุณคือ MVP"
content: Dear trainers: \n    Maintenance of the server is completed! As we opened "a can of worms", many bugs appeared and have caused unnecessary problems and losses to the trainers. Therefore, we will be giving trainers some rewards as a token of apology. Please check your mail to receive it. \n    As this is our first test, we thank you for your understanding!
content_tw: 親愛的小夥伴:\n    現在伺服器已維護完畢！由於我們的工作人員打開了“暗黑之門”，放出了很多BUG，給您造成了不必要麻煩和損失，現特此對您進行補償，補償內容已隨郵件發送，請及時查收。\n    首次測試，希望獲得您的諒解!
content_en: Dear trainers: \n    Maintenance of the server is completed! As we opened "a can of worms", many bugs appeared and have caused unnecessary problems and losses to the trainers. Therefore, we will be giving trainers some rewards as a token of apology. Please check your mail to receive it. \n    As this is our first test, we thank you for your understanding!
content_vn: Các nhà huấn luyện thân mến: \n    Bảo trì máy chủ đã hoàn tất! Khi chúng tôi mở "một hộp sâu", nhiều lỗi đã xuất hiện và gây ra những vấn đề và tổn thất không cần thiết cho các nhà huấn luyện. Vì vậy, chúng tôi sẽ tặng một số phần thưởng cho các nhà huấn luyện như một lời xin lỗi. Vui lòng kiểm tra thư để nhận. \n    Vì đây là lần thử nghiệm đầu tiên của chúng tôi, chúng tôi cảm ơn sự thông cảm của bạn!
content_kr: 트레이너님: \n   서버 점검이 완료되었습니다! 작업자들이 “어둠의 문”을 열어 발생한 버그로 불편함을 끼쳐드려 대단히 죄송합니다. 이에 대한 보상을 우편으로 지급합니다. 제때 수령해 주세요. \n   첫 테스트입니다. 많은 양해 바랍니다!
content_pt: Caros Treinadores: \n    A manutenção do servidor foi concluída! Como abrimos "uma lata de minhocas", muitos bugs apareceram e causaram problemas e perdas desnecessárias aos treinadores. Portanto, estaremos dando aos treinadores algumas recompensas como um pedido de desculpas. Por favor, verifique seu correio para recebê-las. \n    Como este é nosso primeiro teste, agradecemos sua compreensão!
content_th: ถึงเหล่าเทรนเนอร์: \n    การบำรุงรักษาเซิร์ฟเวอร์เสร็จสมบูรณ์แล้ว! เนื่องจากการที่เราเปิด "กล่องแพนโดร่า" ทำให้เกิดบั๊กจำนวนมากและสร้างปัญหาและความสูญเสียที่ไม่จำเป็นแก่เทรนเนอร์ ดังนั้นเราจะมอบรางวัลบางอย่างให้แก่เทรนเนอร์เพื่อเป็นการขอโทษ โปรดตรวจสอบจดหมายของคุณเพื่อรับรางวัล \n    เนื่องจากนี่เป็นการทดสอบครั้งแรกของเรา เราขอขอบคุณสำหรับความเข้าใจของคุณ!

sender_th: เลขาตัวน้อย
subject: System Annoucement
subject_vn: Thông báo Hệ thống
subject_pt: Anúncio do Sistema
subject_th: ประกาศจากระบบ
content: Dear trainers:\n    In order to ensure a seamless gaming experience, the server will be rebooting from 16:30-16:45 to fix some issues. When the sever reopens, please check your mail to claim the compensation reward for the disruption. n    Happy gaming!
content_tw: 親愛的小夥伴:\n    為了能讓您更流暢的體驗遊戲，伺服器將在16:30——16:45重啟，進行部分問題修復。重新開服後，補償獎勵將會發送到您的信箱中，屆時，請您及時查收。\n    祝您遊戲愉快!
content_en: Dear trainers:\n    In order to ensure a seamless gaming experience, the server will be rebooting from 16:30-16:45 to fix some issues. When the sever reopens, please check your mail to claim the compensation reward for the disruption. n    Happy gaming!
content_vn: Các nhà huấn luyện thân mến:\n    Để đảm bảo trải nghiệm chơi game liền mạch, máy chủ sẽ khởi động lại từ 16:30-16:45 để khắc phục một số sự cố. Khi máy chủ mở lại, vui lòng kiểm tra thư để nhận phần thưởng đền bù cho sự gián đoạn. \n    Chúc bạn chơi game vui vẻ!
content_kr: 트레이너님: \n    쾌적한 게임 체험을 위해 서버가 16:30~16:45에 재시작되며, 일부 문제에 대한 해결을 진행합니다. 서버 개방 후 보상이 우편으로 지급될 예정입니다. 지급 시 제때 수령해 주세요. \n   즐거운 게임 되시길 바랍니다!
content_pt: Caros Treinadores:\n    Para garantir uma experiência de jogo sem interrupções, o servidor será reiniciado das 16:30 às 16:45 para corrigir alguns problemas. Quando o servidor reabrir, por favor, verifique seu correio para resgatar a recompensa de compensação pela interrupção. \n    Bom jogo!
content_th: ถึงเหล่าเทรนเนอร์:\n    เพื่อรับประกันประสบการณ์การเล่นเกมที่ราบรื่น เซิร์ฟเวอร์จะทำการรีบูตตั้งแต่เวลา 16:30-16:45 เพื่อแก้ไขปัญหาบางอย่าง เมื่อเซิร์ฟเวอร์เปิดให้บริการอีกครั้ง โปรดตรวจสอบจดหมายของคุณเพื่อรับรางวัลชดเชยสำหรับการหยุดชะงัก \n    ขอให้สนุกกับการเล่นเกม!

sender_th: แองเจวูมอน
subject: Get double returns for making purchases during beta testing
subject_tw: 刪檔測試儲值雙倍返還
subject_en: Get double returns for making purchases during beta testing
subject_vn: Nhận hoàn trả gấp đôi khi nạp trong giai đoạn thử nghiệm beta
subject_pt: Receba retornos em dobro por compras durante o teste beta
subject_th: รับผลตอบแทนสองเท่าเมื่อซื้อสินค้าในช่วงทดสอบเบต้า
content:
#C0xffe672##F24#Dear trainers:
    
   With your support for the Great Pokémon Adventure, we present you the permanent account testing.  In order to give back to the Pokémon trainers who have went through a journey with us in the digital world, we hereby refund double of your purchase amount during the temporary testing period (gift diamonds are not included in the refund, double refund can only be collected in one server). 
    The chosen ones, you may now begin your adventure!
   By the Great Pokémon Adventure Game Developers
content_tw:
#C0xffe672##F24#親愛的馴獸師們:
    
   《數碼寶貝大冒險》在你們的支持下，終於迎來了不刪檔測試。為了回饋曾與我們一起奮鬥在數碼世界的馴獸師們，現特此對您在刪檔期間的儲值金額進行雙倍返還（贈送鑽石不在返還範圍內，雙倍返還只能在一區領取）。
    被選召的孩子，開啟冒險之旅吧！
    《數碼寶貝大冒險》運營組
content_en:
#C0xffe672##F24#Dear trainers:
    
   With your support for the Great Pokémon Adventure, we present you the permanent account testing.  In order to give back to the Pokémon trainers who have went through a journey with us in the digital world, we hereby refund double of your purchase amount during the temporary testing period (gift diamonds are not included in the refund, double refund can only be collected in one server). 
    The chosen ones, you may now begin your adventure!
   By the Great Pokémon Adventure Game Developers
content_vn:
#C0xffe672##F24#Các nhà huấn luyện thân mến:
    
   Với sự ủng hộ của bạn dành cho Cuộc phiêu lưu Pokémon Vĩ đại, chúng tôi xin giới thiệu bản thử nghiệm tài khoản vĩnh viễn. Để tri ân những nhà huấn luyện Pokémon đã cùng chúng tôi trải qua một hành trình trong thế giới kỹ thuật số, chúng tôi xin hoàn lại gấp đôi số tiền bạn đã mua trong giai đoạn thử nghiệm tạm thời (kim cương quà tặng không được tính vào hoàn trả, hoàn trả gấp đôi chỉ có thể nhận ở một máy chủ). 
    Những người được chọn, bây giờ bạn có thể bắt đầu cuộc phiêu lưu của mình!
   Từ các nhà phát triển game Cuộc phiêu lưu Pokémon Vĩ đại
content_kr:
#C0xffe672##F24#트레이너 여러분: 
   
   여러분들의 성원 덕분에 《포켓몬 어드벤처》가 마침내 정식으로 출시되었습니다. 함께해준 여러분께 보답하기 위해, 테스트 기간 동안 충전하신 금액을 기준으로 2배의 반환 혜택을 드릴 예정입니다(증정 다이아는 반환 범위에 포함되지 않으며, 2배 반환은 한 서버에서만 수령 가능). 
   선택받은 여러분, 이제 모험의 여정을 시작할 때가 되었습니다!
   《포켓몬 어드벤처》 운영진
content_pt:
#C0xffe672##F24#Caros Treinadores:
    
   Com o seu apoio à Grande Aventura Pokémon, apresentamos o teste de conta permanente. Para retribuir aos treinadores Pokémon que passaram por uma jornada conosco no mundo digital, estamos reembolsando o dobro do valor de sua compra durante o período de teste temporário (diamantes de presente não estão incluídos no reembolso, o reembolso em dobro só pode ser coletado em um servidor). 
    Os escolhidos, vocês podem agora começar sua aventura!
   Pelos Desenvolvedores do Jogo Grande Aventura Pokémon
content_th:
#C0xffe672##F24#ถึงเหล่าเทรนเนอร์:
    
   ด้วยการสนับสนุนของคุณสำหรับการผจญภัยโปเกมอนอันยิ่งใหญ่ เราขอนำเสนอการทดสอบบัญชีถาวร เพื่อเป็นการตอบแทนเทรนเนอร์โปเกมอนที่ได้เดินทางร่วมกับเราในโลกดิจิทัล เราจึงขอคืนเงินสองเท่าของยอดซื้อของคุณในช่วงทดสอบชั่วคราว (เพชรของขวัญไม่รวมอยู่ในการคืนเงิน การคืนเงินสองเท่าสามารถรับได้ในเซิร์ฟเวอร์เดียวเท่านั้น) 
    ผู้ที่ถูกเลือก ตอนนี้คุณสามารถเริ่มการผจญภัยของคุณได้แล้ว!
   โดยทีมผู้พัฒนาเกมการผจญภัยโปเกมอนอันยิ่งใหญ่

content_kr: 트레이너님: \n   추석을 맞이해 오늘 로그인에 대한 보상을 우편으로 지급합니다. 제때 수령해 주세요. \n   즐거운 게임 되시길 바랍니다!
content_pt: Caros Treinadores:\n    Obrigado por fazer login hoje. Desejamos a você um Feliz Festival de Meio do Outono! Por favor, resgate as recompensas de login em seu correio.\n    Bom jogo!
content_th: ถึงเหล่าเทรนเนอร์:\n    ขอบคุณที่ล็อกอินในวันนี้ เราขอให้คุณมีความสุขในเทศกาลกลางฤดูใบไม้ร่วง! โปรดรับรางวัลการล็อกอินในจดหมายของคุณ\n    ขอให้สนุกกับการเล่นเกม!

content: To all our striving Tamers:\n     Happy New Year. As a new year begins in the human world, this boring game, created by us brain-dead designers, is about to accompany everyone through half a year. Since going live, we've been constantly thinking about how to bring bene(ﬁts) and harm to our players, trying our best to create BUGs just to hand out welfare. Because we haven't forgotten our original intention—how to restore an authentic Digital World in the real world. So, we are different from those other crudely made digital games; we are not that crude. Even when the budget is tight and we have to sell our kidneys, we are determined to fully depict the details of the Digital World (the dev team's kidneys are almost gone).\n    Shamelessly, we say, we hope that this most exquisite digital game on the market can accompany you through this year, the next year, and every year, to go find that "infinitely vast dream."
content_tw: 奮鬥的馴獸師們:\n     新年好。人間界新的一年來臨了，我們這些腦殘策劃，所製作的這款無聊的遊戲，也即將陪伴大家走過半年的時光。上線以來，我們無時無刻不在想著如何造（keng）福（hai）玩家，想法設法製造BUG，給玩家發福利。因為我們不忘初衷——如何在現世中，還原一個原汁原味的數碼世界。所以，我們和其他那些粗製濫造的數碼遊戲不同，我們沒有那麼粗，在經費不足必須賣腎的情況下，也要把數碼世界的細節刻畫充分（開發組的腎已經不夠用了）。\n    我們不要臉的說，希望目前市面上這款最精緻的數碼遊戲，能陪你走過，這一年，下一年和每一年，去找回那“無限大的夢”。
content_en: To all our striving Tamers:\n     Happy New Year. As a new year begins in the human world, this boring game, created by us brain-dead designers, is about to accompany everyone through half a year. Since going live, we've been constantly thinking about how to bring bene(ﬁts) and harm to our players, trying our best to create BUGs just to hand out welfare. Because we haven't forgotten our original intention—how to restore an authentic Digital World in the real world. So, we are different from those other crudely made digital games; we are not that crude. Even when the budget is tight and we have to sell our kidneys, we are determined to fully depict the details of the Digital World (the dev team's kidneys are almost gone).\n    Shamelessly, we say, we hope that this most exquisite digital game on the market can accompany you through this year, the next year, and every year, to go find that "infinitely vast dream."
content_vn: Gửi các Nhà Huấn luyện đang nỗ lực:\n     Chúc mừng năm mới. Một năm mới đã đến với thế giới loài người, và trò chơi nhàm chán do chúng tôi, những nhà thiết kế não phẳng này tạo ra, cũng sắp đồng hành cùng mọi người được nửa năm. Kể từ khi ra mắt, chúng tôi không ngừng suy nghĩ về cách mang lại phúc (hại) lợi cho người chơi, tìm mọi cách tạo ra BUG để phát phúc lợi cho các bạn. Bởi vì chúng tôi không quên mục tiêu ban đầu—làm thế nào để tái hiện một Thế giới Kỹ thuật số chân thực nhất trong thế giới thực. Vì vậy, không giống như những game kỹ thuật số được làm một cách cẩu thả khác, chúng tôi không cẩu thả đến thế. Ngay cả khi kinh phí eo hẹp và phải bán thận, chúng tôi vẫn quyết tâm khắc họa đầy đủ mọi chi tiết của Thế giới Kỹ thuật số (thận của đội ngũ phát triển sắp hết rồi).\n    Mặt dày mà nói, chúng tôi hy vọng rằng trò chơi kỹ thuật số tinh xảo nhất trên thị trường hiện nay có thể cùng bạn đi qua năm nay, năm sau và mỗi năm, để tìm lại "giấc mơ vô tận" ấy.
content_kr: 노력하는 테이머 여러분께:\n     새해 복 많이 받으세요. 인간 세상에 새로운 한 해가 시작되었고, 저희 뇌 없는 기획자들이 만든 이 지루한 게임도 여러분과 함께 반년의 시간을 보내게 되었습니다. 출시 이후, 저희는 잠시도 쉬지 않고 어떻게 플레이어들에게 혜택(과 피해)을 줄 수 있을지 고민하며, 복지를 나눠드리기 위해 열심히 버그를 만들어냈습니다. 저희는 현실 세계에서 원작의 느낌을 그대로 살린 디지털 월드를 재현하겠다는 초심을 잊지 않았기 때문입니다. 그래서 저희는 다른 조잡한 디지털 게임들과 다르게, 그렇게 조잡하지 않습니다. 예산이 부족해 신장이라도 팔아야 하는 상황에서도, 디지털 월드의 세세한 부분까지 완벽하게 그려내기 위해 노력했습니다 (개발팀의 신장은 이미 바닥났습니다).\n    염치없지만, 저희는 현재 시장에 나온 가장 정교한 이 디지털 게임이 여러분과 함께 올해, 내년, 그리고 매년 그 "무한한 꿈"을 찾아가는 여정에 동행할 수 있기를 바랍니다.
content_pt: A todos os nossos dedicados Domadores:\n     Feliz Ano Novo. Um novo ano chegou ao mundo humano, e este jogo chato, criado por nós, os designers sem cérebro, está prestes a acompanhar a todos por meio ano. Desde o lançamento, estivemos pensando sem parar em como trazer benefícios (e prejuízos) aos jogadores, fazendo o possível para criar BUGS, para dar vantagens a vocês. Porque não esquecemos nossa intenção original — como recriar um Mundo Digital autêntico no mundo real. Por isso, somos diferentes daqueles outros jogos digitais feitos de qualquer jeito, não somos tão grosseiros assim. Mesmo quando o orçamento aperta e temos que vender nossos rins, estamos determinados a retratar todos os detalhes do Mundo Digital (os rins da equipe de desenvolvimento já estão acabando).\n    Descaradamente, esperamos que este, o jogo digital mais requintado do mercado, possa acompanhá-lo por este ano, pelo próximo e por todos os anos, para reencontrar aquele "sonho infinitamente grande."
content_th: ถึงเหล่าเทมเมอร์ผู้มุมานะทั้งหลาย:\n     สวัสดีปีใหม่ครับ เมื่อปีใหม่ในโลกมนุษย์ได้มาถึง เกมแสนน่าเบื่อที่สร้างโดยพวกเราเหล่านักวางแผนสมองกลวง ก็กำลังจะร่วมเดินทางกับทุกท่านมาครบครึ่งปีแล้ว นับตั้งแต่เปิดให้บริการ เราไม่เคยหยุดคิดเลยว่าจะสร้างประโยชน์(และโทษ)ให้ผู้เล่นได้อย่างไร เราพยายามสร้าง BUG เพื่อแจกสวัสดิการให้ผู้เล่น เพราะเราไม่ลืมปณิธานแรกเริ่ม นั่นคือการฟื้นฟูโลกดิจิทัลที่สมจริงขึ้นมาในโลกแห่งความจริง ดังนั้น เราจึงแตกต่างจากเกมดิจิทัลหยาบๆ เหล่านั้น เราไม่ได้หยาบขนาดนั้น แม้ในตอนที่งบประมาณไม่พอและต้องขายไต เราก็ยังต้องถ่ายทอดรายละเอียดของโลกดิจิทัลออกมาให้สมบูรณ์ที่สุด (ไตของทีมพัฒนาจะหมดแล้วครับ)\n    เราขอกล่าวอย่างหน้าไม่อายว่า หวังว่าเกมดิจิทัลที่ประณีตที่สุดในตลาดตอนนี้ จะได้ร่วมเดินทางไปกับคุณในปีนี้ ปีหน้า และทุกๆ ปี เพื่อกลับไปตามหา "ความฝันอันกว้างใหญ่ไร้ขีดจำกัด" นั้นด้วยกัน

subject_vn: Phần thưởng an ủi Dự đoán Vòng loại Đại chiến Căn phòng
subject_kr: 방 대작전 예선전 예측 실패 보상

content: Dear partner:\n    You did not guess correctly in the Room Battle Preliminary Guessing. Below is the consolation prize. Please keep up the good work. The settlement rewards have been sent via mail, please claim them in time.\n    Happy gaming!
content_tw: 親愛的小夥伴:\n    您在部屋大作戰初賽競猜中沒有競猜正確，以下是安慰獎，請再接再厲，結算獎勵已隨郵件發送，請及时查收。\n    祝您遊戲愉快!
content_en: Dear partner:\n    You did not guess correctly in the Room Battle Preliminary Guessing. Below is the consolation prize. Please keep up the good work. The settlement rewards have been sent via mail, please claim them in time.\n    Happy gaming!
content_vn: Bạn thân mến:\n    Bạn đã không dự đoán đúng trong phần Dự đoán Vòng loại của Đại chiến Căn phòng, sau đây là phần thưởng an ủi, hãy cố gắng hơn nữa. Phần thưởng tổng kết đã được gửi qua thư, vui lòng kiểm tra và nhận kịp thời.\n    Chúc bạn chơi game vui vẻ!
content_kr: 친애하는 파트너님:\n    방 대작전 예선전 예측에서 맞추지 못하셨습니다. 다음은 위로상입니다. 계속 노력해 주세요. 정산 보상이 메일로 발송되었으니, 제때 확인해 주시기 바랍니다.\n    즐거운 게임 되세요!
content_pt: Caro(a) parceiro(a):\n    Você não acertou na Aposta das Preliminares da Batalha de Quartos. Abaixo está o prêmio de consolação. Por favor, continue se esforçando. As recompensas de acerto foram enviadas por correio, por favor, resgate-as a tempo.\n    Bom jogo!
content_th: ถึงเพื่อนรัก:\n    คุณทายผลในรอบคัดเลือกของสงครามห้องไม่ถูกต้อง ด้านล่างนี้คือรางวัลปลอบใจ โปรดพยายามต่อไป รางวัลสรุปผลได้ถูกส่งไปทางจดหมายแล้ว โปรดตรวจสอบและรับให้ทันเวลา\n    ขอให้สนุกกับเกม!

content: Dear trainer:\n    Since you have not claimed the rewards completed during the event, we're reissuing the rewards to you. Please check and claim the following rewards.\n    Happy gaming!

content: Dear trainer:\n    Welcome to this mysterious and interesting Pokémon World. This is a small token for you, hope that this can help you in your future adventure.\n    Happy gaming!
content_tw: 親愛的小夥伴:\n    歡迎您加入神秘有趣的口袋精靈世界，這是一點小禮物，希望能在今後的旅途中幫助到你。\n    祝您遊戲愉快!
content_en: Dear trainer:\n    Welcome to this mysterious and interesting Pokémon World. This is a small token for you, hope that this can help you in your future adventure.\n    Happy gaming!
content_vn: Nhà huấn luyện thân mến:\n    Chào mừng bạn đến với Thế giới Pokémon bí ẩn và thú vị này. Đây là một món quà nhỏ dành cho bạn, hy vọng rằng nó có thể giúp bạn trong cuộc phiêu lưu tương lai.\n    Chúc bạn chơi game vui vẻ!
content_kr: 트레이너님: \n   신비한 포켓몬 세계에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 환영의 뜻으로 작은 선물을 준비했습니다. 부디 앞으로의 여정에 도움이 되길 바랍니다. \n   즐거운 게임 되시길 바랍니다!

content_th: ถึงเทรนเนอร์:\n    ยินดีต้อนรับสู่โลกโปเกมอนที่ลึกลับและน่าสนใจนี้ นี่คือของขวัญเล็กๆ น้อยๆ สำหรับคุณ หวังว่ามันจะช่วยคุณในการผจญภัยในอนาคต\n    ขอให้สนุกกับการเล่นเกม!

content: Dear trainer:\n    Welcome to this mysterious and interesting Pokémon World. This is a small token for you, hope that this can help you in your future adventure.\n    Happy gaming!

subject: Notice for illegal discount top-up
subject_vn: Thông báo về việc nạp tiền giảm giá bất hợp pháp
subject_pt: Aviso sobre recarga com desconto ilegal
subject_th: ประกาศเกี่ยวกับการเติมเงินส่วนลดที่ผิดกฎหมาย
content:
Dear trainers,
  Recently we found that some trainer are using illegal third-party top-up method.
  In order to maintain the fairness of the game, and ensure everyone's account safety,we will take action on trainers who using illegal third-party top-up.
  1) Illegal recharge channels is unsecure for your personal information and your credit card.
  2) If after using illegal third-party top-up and service provider refunds, you account will be banned.
  3) We will not deal with any issue caused by using illegal third-party top-up method.
  4) Your account may being stolen by illegal top-up service providers.
  Please cherish your account and be aware of "discount" top-up scam.
  Sincerely
  Devs group
content_en:
Dear trainers,
  Recently we found that some trainer are using illegal third-party top-up method.
  In order to maintain the fairness of the game, and ensure everyone's account safety,we will take action on trainers who using illegal third-party top-up.
  1) Illegal recharge channels is unsecure for your personal information and your credit card.
  2) If after using illegal third-party top-up and service provider refunds, you account will be banned.
  3) We will not deal with any issue caused by using illegal third-party top-up method.
  4) Your account may being stolen by illegal top-up service providers.
  Please cherish your account and be aware of "discount" top-up scam.
  Sincerely
  Devs group
content_vn:
Các nhà huấn luyện thân mến,
  Gần đây chúng tôi phát hiện ra rằng một số nhà huấn luyện đang sử dụng phương thức nạp tiền của bên thứ ba bất hợp pháp.
  Để duy trì sự công bằng của trò chơi và đảm bảo an toàn cho tài khoản của mọi người, chúng tôi sẽ có biện pháp đối với những nhà huấn luyện sử dụng phương thức nạp tiền của bên thứ ba bất hợp pháp.
  1) Các kênh nạp tiền bất hợp pháp không an toàn cho thông tin cá nhân và thẻ tín dụng của bạn.
  2) Nếu sau khi sử dụng phương thức nạp tiền của bên thứ ba bất hợp pháp và nhà cung cấp dịch vụ hoàn tiền, tài khoản của bạn sẽ bị cấm.
  3) Chúng tôi sẽ không giải quyết bất kỳ vấn đề nào phát sinh do sử dụng phương thức nạp tiền của bên thứ ba bất hợp pháp.
  4) Tài khoản của bạn có thể bị các nhà cung cấp dịch vụ nạp tiền bất hợp pháp đánh cắp.
  Vui lòng quý trọng tài khoản của bạn và cảnh giác với lừa đảo nạp tiền "giảm giá".
  Trân trọng
  Nhóm phát triển
content_pt:
Caros Treinadores,
  Recentemente descobrimos que alguns treinadores estão usando métodos de recarga ilegais de terceiros.
  Para manter a justiça do jogo e garantir a segurança da conta de todos, tomaremos medidas contra os treinadores que usam recargas ilegais de terceiros.
  1) Canais de recarga ilegais não são seguros para suas informações pessoais e seu cartão de crédito.
  2) Se após usar a recarga ilegal de terceiros e o provedor de serviços reembolsar, sua conta será banida.
  3) Não trataremos de nenhum problema causado pelo uso de métodos de recarga ilegais de terceiros.
  4) Sua conta pode ser roubada por provedores de serviços de recarga ilegais.
  Por favor, valorize sua conta e esteja ciente de golpes de recarga com "desconto".
  Atenciosamente
  Grupo de Desenvolvedores
content_th:
ถึงเหล่าเทรนเนอร์,
  เมื่อเร็วๆ นี้เราพบว่ามีเทรนเนอร์บางคนใช้วิธีการเติมเงินจากบุคคลที่สามที่ผิดกฎหมาย
  เพื่อรักษาความเป็นธรรมของเกมและรับประกันความปลอดภัยของบัญชีผู้ใช้ทุกคน เราจะดำเนินการกับเทรนเนอร์ที่ใช้การเติมเงินจากบุคคลที่สามที่ผิดกฎหมาย
  1) ช่องทางการเติมเงินที่ผิดกฎหมายไม่ปลอดภัยสำหรับข้อมูลส่วนบุคคลและบัตรเครดิตของคุณ
  2) หากหลังจากการใช้การเติมเงินจากบุคคลที่สามที่ผิดกฎหมายแล้วผู้ให้บริการทำการคืนเงิน บัญชีของคุณจะถูกแบน
  3) เราจะไม่จัดการกับปัญหาใดๆ ที่เกิดจากการใช้วิธีการเติมเงินจากบุคคลที่สามที่ผิดกฎหมาย
  4) บัญชีของคุณอาจถูกขโมยโดยผู้ให้บริการเติมเงินที่ผิดกฎหมาย
  โปรดรักษาบัญชีของคุณและระวังการหลอกลวงการเติมเงิน "ลดราคา"
  ขอแสดงความนับถือ
  กลุ่มผู้พัฒนา
